zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight於1257年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Sir Alexander de Hampdon41歲，母親Marion Herdeley15歲。他於大約1301年與Nichola de Grenville在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年在英國巴金哈姆爾哈普登 洛福享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight于1257年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Sir Alexander de Hampdon41岁，母亲Marion Herdeley15岁。他于大约1301年与Nichola de Grenville在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年在英国巴金哈姆爾哈普登 洛福享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight was born in 1257, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alexander de Hampdon, was 41 and his mother, Marion Herdeley, was 15. He married Nichola de Grenville about 1301, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1332, in Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight est né en 1257, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander de Hampdon, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Marion Herdeley, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Nichola de Grenville environ 1301, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1332, à Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight 1257 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander de Hampdon 41 und seine Mutter Marion Herdeley 15. Er hat um 1301 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Nichola de Grenville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1332 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight è nato il nel 1257 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Alexander de Hampdon, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Marion Herdeley, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Nichola de Grenville circa 1301, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1332, nel Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knightが1257年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander de Hampdonは41歳，母Marion Herdeleyは15歳であった。約1301年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでNichola de Grenvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンプデン ローで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight(이)가 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander de Hampdon(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Herdeley(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Nichola de Grenville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 영국 벅잉함실르 함p든 로에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight nasceu em 1257, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander de Hampdon, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Marion Herdeley, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichola de Grenville aproximadamente 1301, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1332, em Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight родился в 1257 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander de Hampdon было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Marion Herdeley, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichola de Grenville около 1301 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1332 г. в местности хампден роу, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight nació en 1257, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander de Hampdon, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Marion Herdeley, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Nichola de Grenville aproximadamente 1301, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1332, en Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
